meaning: adj.未搀水,未冲淡的,纯粹的
examples: I will look back at this one with undiluted pleasure.
That may not be undiluted good news.
The measure of hue and saturation of a colour, undiluted with white, black or grey.
Its beverage segment provides original materials such as undiluted solutions and sugars, and packaging materials.
Undiluted fun, dynamism and an ecologically-friendly philosophy combined for the first time in an electric powered two-wheeler.
